'''Ion Team's spec-one''' was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] who served in [[Ion Team]] as the group's [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] specialist. When [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo]] issued [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], the spec-one, along with the rest of Ion Team, questioned and disobeyed the order, allowing [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] [[Roan Shryne]], [[Bol Chatak]], and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Olee Starstone]] to escape. The spec-one was later captured along with the rest of his squad and taken to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].<ref name="Rise of Vader" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ion Team's spec-one appeared in the [[2005]] novel, ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''. Of the four commandos in the team, the spec-one was the only clone to not be named.<ref name="Rise of Vader" />

==Appearances==
